diff --git a/deploy/helm/deployment-k8s/README.md b/deploy/helm/deployment-k8s/README.md
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..796e24a
--- /dev/null
+++ b/deploy/helm/deployment-k8s/README.md
@@ -0,0 +1,222 @@
+# AI-Q Kubernetes Deployment
+
+Deploy AI-Q to a Kubernetes cluster using the Helm charts in this repository.
+
+## Repository Structure
+
+```
+deployment-k8s/
+├── stg/                  # Helm chart for the STG environment
+│   ├── Chart.yaml        # Chart definition (depends on ../helm-charts-k8s/aiq)
+│   └── values.yaml       # Deployment values for this environment
+└── README.md
+
+helm-charts-k8s/
+└── aiq/                  # Base application Helm chart
+```
+
+The `stg/` chart references `helm-charts-k8s/aiq` as a local file dependency. Both directories must be present at the same level.
+
+## Prerequisites
+
+- Kubernetes cluster (Kind, EKS, GKE, AKS, etc.)
+- `kubectl` configured with cluster access
+- `helm` v3.x installed
+- Required API keys (see [Secrets](#secrets) section)
+
+## Building and Loading Images for Kind
+
+For local development with a [Kind](https://kind.sigs.k8s.io/) cluster, you build images locally and load them directly into the cluster — no registry push required.
+
+### 1. Build the images
+
+Run the following from the **repository root**:
+
+```bash
+# Backend
+docker build --platform linux/amd64 \
+  -f deploy/Dockerfile \
+  -t aiq-research-assistant:dev \
+  .
+
+# Frontend
+docker build --platform linux/amd64 \
+  -f frontends/ui/deploy/Dockerfile \
+  -t aiq-frontend:dev \
+  frontends/ui
+```
+
+This produces two local images:
+- `aiq-research-assistant:dev` — backend (Python / FastAPI)
+- `aiq-frontend:dev` — frontend (Next.js)
+
+### 2. Load the images into Kind
+
+```bash
+kind load docker-image aiq-research-assistant:dev --name <your-cluster-name>
+kind load docker-image aiq-frontend:dev --name <your-cluster-name>
+```
+
+> Run `kind get clusters` if you are unsure of the cluster name.
+
+### 3. Configure values to use the local images
+
+Edit `deployment-k8s/stg/values.yaml` (or pass `--set` flags at deploy time) so the image references match what you loaded:
+
+```yaml
+aiq:
+  apps:
+    backend:
+      image:
+        repository: aiq-research-assistant
+        tag: dev
+        pullPolicy: Never      # <-- critical: tells k8s not to pull from a registry
+    frontend:
+      image:
+        repository: aiq-frontend
+        tag: dev
+        pullPolicy: Never
+```
+
+Or pass them inline:
+
+```bash
+helm upgrade --install aiq deployment-k8s/stg/ -n aiq --create-namespace \
+  --set aiq.apps.backend.image.repository=aiq-research-assistant \
+  --set aiq.apps.backend.image.tag=dev \
+  --set aiq.apps.backend.image.pullPolicy=Never \
+  --set aiq.apps.frontend.image.repository=aiq-frontend \
+  --set aiq.apps.frontend.image.tag=dev \
+  --set aiq.apps.frontend.image.pullPolicy=Never
+```
+
+### 4. Create the credentials secret and deploy
+
+Follow the [Setup](#setup) and [Deploy](#deploy) sections below, then verify with:
+
+```bash
+kubectl get pods -n aiq
+```
+
+After a rebuild, reload the updated image with `kind load docker-image ...` and restart the affected deployment:
+
+```bash
+kubectl rollout restart deployment -n aiq aiq-backend   # or aiq-frontend
+```
+
+---
+
+## Setup
+
+> **Note:** If you generated these charts using the blueprint generator, `helm dependency update` was already run automatically. Only run it manually if you re-package or move the charts.
+
+### 1. Create the credentials secret
+
+The deployment reads API keys and database credentials from a Kubernetes Secret named `aiq-credentials`.
+
+```bash
+kubectl create secret generic aiq-credentials -n aiq \
+  --from-literal=NVIDIA_API_KEY="your-nvidia-api-key" \
+  --from-literal=TAVILY_API_KEY="your-tavily-api-key" \
+  --from-literal=DB_USER_NAME="aiq" \
+  --from-literal=DB_USER_PASSWORD="your-db-password"
+```
+
+Or from environment variables:
+
+```bash
+kubectl create secret generic aiq-credentials -n aiq \
+  --from-literal=NVIDIA_API_KEY="$NVIDIA_API_KEY" \
+  --from-literal=TAVILY_API_KEY="$TAVILY_API_KEY" \
+  --from-literal=DB_USER_NAME="$DB_USER_NAME" \
+  --from-literal=DB_USER_PASSWORD="$DB_USER_PASSWORD"
+```
+
+## Deploy
+
+```bash
+helm install aiq deployment-k8s/stg/ -n aiq --create-namespace
+```
+
+### Verify
+
+```bash
+kubectl get pods -n aiq
+```
+
+Expected output:
+
+```
+NAME                            READY   STATUS    RESTARTS   AGE
+aiq-backend-xxx                 1/1     Running   0          30s
+aiq-frontend-xxx                1/1     Running   0          30s
+aiq-postgres-xxx                1/1     Running   0          30s
+```
+
+## Secrets
+
+### Required
+
+| Key | Description |
+|-----|-------------|
+| `NVIDIA_API_KEY` | API key for NIM inference models |
+| `TAVILY_API_KEY` | Tavily API key for web search |
+| `DB_USER_NAME` | PostgreSQL username |
+| `DB_USER_PASSWORD` | PostgreSQL password |
+
+### Optional
+
+| Key | Description |
+|-----|-------------|
+| `SERPER_API_KEY` | Serper API key for Google search |
+| `JINA_API_KEY` | Jina API key |
+| `WANDB_API_KEY` | Weights & Biases API key |
+| `NVIDIA_INFERENCE_API_KEY` | Alternative inference key (defaults to `NVIDIA_API_KEY`) |
+| `INFERENCE_NVIDIA_API_KEY` | Alternative inference key (defaults to `NVIDIA_API_KEY`) |
+
+### Updating Secrets
+
+```bash
+kubectl delete secret aiq-credentials -n aiq
+kubectl create secret generic aiq-credentials -n aiq \
+  --from-literal=NVIDIA_API_KEY="new-key" \
+  --from-literal=TAVILY_API_KEY="new-key" \
+  --from-literal=DB_USER_NAME="aiq" \
+  --from-literal=DB_USER_PASSWORD="new-password"
+
+kubectl rollout restart deployment -n aiq aiq-backend aiq-frontend
+```
+
+## Accessing the Application
+
+```bash
+# Frontend UI
+kubectl port-forward -n aiq svc/aiq-frontend 3000:3000
+
+# Backend API
+kubectl port-forward -n aiq svc/aiq-backend 8000:8000
+```
+
+Then open: http://localhost:3000
+
+## Upgrade
+
+```bash
+helm upgrade aiq deployment-k8s/stg/ -n aiq
+```
+
+## Override Values
+
+```bash
+helm upgrade --install aiq deployment-k8s/stg/ -n aiq \
+  --set aiq.apps.backend.replicas=2
+```
+
+## Uninstall
+
+```bash
+helm uninstall aiq -n aiq
+
+# Optionally remove namespace and secrets
+kubectl delete namespace aiq
+```

diff --git a/deploy/helm/deployment-k8s/stg/values.yaml b/deploy/helm/deployment-k8s/stg/values.yaml
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..d3754bb
--- /dev/null
+++ b/deploy/helm/deployment-k8s/stg/values.yaml
@@ -0,0 +1,234 @@
+# Generated WEB mode deployment for STG
+
+aiq:
+  appname: aiq
+  project:
+    name: aiq
+    deploymentEnv: stg
+    cluster_name: in-cluster
+    cloud_provider: kind
+    primary_owner: developer@localhost
+    secondary_owner: developer@localhost
+    blueprint_type: web
+    deploymentTarget: kubernetes
+    orientation: external
+    profile: web
+    services:
+    - backend
+    - frontend
+    - postgres
+    - rag
+  sharedSecrets:
+    enabled: true
+    autoMount: true
+    refreshInterval: 5m
+    dataFrom: []
+  apps:
+    backend:
+      enabled: true
+      replicas: 1
+      image:
+        repository: ""
+        tag: 2602.23.ext.rc0
+        pullPolicy: IfNotPresent
+      imagePullSecrets: []
+      service:
+        type: ClusterIP
+        port: 8000
+        targetPort: 8000
+      port: 8000
+      healthCheck:
+        enabled: false
+      resources:
+        requests:
+          cpu: 500m
+          memory: 1Gi
+        limits:
+          cpu: '2'
+          memory: 4Gi
+      env:
+        APP_ENV: production
+        LOG_LEVEL: INFO
+        CONFIG_FILE: configs/config_web_default_llamaindex.yml
+        DASK_NWORKERS: '1'
+        DASK_NTHREADS: '4'
+        NAT_JOB_STORE_DB_URL: postgresql+asyncpg://$(DB_USER_NAME):$(DB_USER_PASSWORD)@aiq-postgres:5432/aiq_jobs
+        AIQ_CHECKPOINT_DB: postgresql://$(DB_USER_NAME):$(DB_USER_PASSWORD)@aiq-postgres:5432/aiq_jobs
+        AIQ_SUMMARY_DB: postgresql+asyncpg://$(DB_USER_NAME):$(DB_USER_PASSWORD)@aiq-postgres:5432/aiq_jobs
+        RAG_SERVER_URL: http://rag-server:8080
+        RAG_INGEST_URL: http://rag-ingest:8080
+        COLLECTION_NAME: default_collection
+        AIQ_CHROMA_DIR: /app/data/chroma
+        MODE: web
+      labels:
+        component: backend
+      route:
+        enabled: false
+        host: localhost
+        tls:
+          termination: edge
+          insecureEdgeTerminationPolicy: Redirect
+        annotations: {}
+      ingress:
+        enabled: false
+        annotations: {}
+      volumes:
+      - name: postgres-init
+        configMap:
+          name: aiq-postgres-init
+      initContainers:
+      - name: db-init
+        image: bitnami/postgresql:16.4.0
+        command:
+        - sh
+        - -c
+        - "echo \"Waiting for postgres...\"\nuntil pg_isready -h aiq-postgres -U aiq\
+          \ -d aiq_jobs; do\n  sleep 2\ndone\necho \"Running init script...\"\npsql\
+          \ -h aiq-postgres -U aiq -d aiq_jobs -f /db-init/init.sql\n"
+        env:
+        - name: PGPASSWORD
+          valueFrom:
+            secretKeyRef:
+              name: aiq-credentials
+              key: DB_USER_PASSWORD
+        - name: DB_USER_NAME
+          valueFrom:
+            secretKeyRef:
+              name: aiq-credentials
+              key: DB_USER_NAME
+        volumeMounts:
+        - name: postgres-init
+          mountPath: /db-init
+          readOnly: true
+      stdin: false
+      tty: false
+      podSecurityContext: null
+    postgres:
+      enabled: true
+      replicas: 1
+      image:
+        repository: bitnami/postgresql
+        tag: "16.4.0"
+        pullPolicy: IfNotPresent
+      service:
+        type: ClusterIP
+        ports:
+        - name: postgres
+          port: 5432
+          targetPort: 5432
+      ports:
+      - name: postgres
+        containerPort: 5432
+        protocol: TCP
+      secretEnv:
+        POSTGRES_USER: DB_USER_NAME
+        POSTGRES_PASSWORD: DB_USER_PASSWORD
+      env:
+        POSTGRES_DB: aiq_jobs
+      configMaps:
+      - name: aiq-postgres-init
+        data:
+          init.sql: "-- =============================================================================\n\
+            -- AI-Q - Database Initialization\n-- This script runs on first PostgreSQL\
+            \ startup (fresh volume only)\n-- =============================================================================\n\
+            --\n-- What this script handles (requires admin privileges):\n--   - Creating\
+            \ databases (aiq_checkpoints)\n--   - Granting permissions\n--   - Creating\
+            \ NAT JobStore table (job_info)\n--   - Creating performance indices\n\
+            --\n-- What the app handles automatically:\n--   - job_events table (event_store.py\
+            \ creates via SQLAlchemy)\n--   - LangGraph checkpoint tables (AsyncPostgresSaver\
+            \ creates them)\n--   - summaries table (summary_store.py creates if not\
+            \ exists)\n--\n-- =============================================================================\n\
+            \n-- Create checkpoints database for LangGraph agent state\nCREATE DATABASE\
+            \ aiq_checkpoints;\n\n-- Grant permissions\nGRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON DATABASE\
+            \ aiq_jobs TO aiq;\nGRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON DATABASE aiq_checkpoints TO\
+            \ aiq;\n\n-- =============================================================================\n\
+            -- Create job store table in aiq_jobs database\n-- Note: job_events table\
+            \ is created by the app (event_store.py)\n-- =============================================================================\n\
+            \\connect aiq_jobs\n\n-- Job metadata table (NAT JobStore - not auto-created\
+            \ by NAT)\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS job_info (\n    job_id VARCHAR PRIMARY\
+            \ KEY,\n    status VARCHAR NOT NULL,\n    config_file VARCHAR,\n    error\
+            \ VARCHAR,\n    output_path VARCHAR,\n    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME\
+            \ ZONE,\n    updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,\n    expiry_seconds\
+            \ INTEGER,\n    output VARCHAR,\n    is_expired BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE\n\
+            );\n\n-- Performance indices\nCREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_job_info_status\
+            \ ON job_info(status);\nCREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_job_info_created_at\
+            \ ON job_info(created_at);\n"
+      persistence:
+      - name: aiq-postgres-data
+        accessModes:
+        - ReadWriteOnce
+        size: 10Gi
+      volumes:
+      - name: postgres-data
+        persistentVolumeClaim:
+          claimName: aiq-postgres-data
+      volumeMounts:
+      - name: postgres-data
+        mountPath: /var/lib/postgresql/data
+      healthCheck:
+        enabled: true
+        livenessProbe:
+          exec:
+            command:
+            - sh
+            - -c
+            - pg_isready -U aiq -d aiq_jobs
+          initialDelaySeconds: 10
+          periodSeconds: 5
+          timeoutSeconds: 5
+          failureThreshold: 5
+        readinessProbe:
+          exec:
+            command:
+            - sh
+            - -c
+            - pg_isready -U aiq -d aiq_jobs
+          initialDelaySeconds: 5
+          periodSeconds: 5
+          timeoutSeconds: 5
+          failureThreshold: 5
+      labels:
+        component: postgres
+      podSecurityContext: null
+    frontend:
+      replicas: 1
+      image:
+        repository: ""
+        tag: 2602.23.ext.rc0
+        pullPolicy: IfNotPresent
+      imagePullSecrets: []
+      service:
+        type: ClusterIP
+        port: 3000
+        targetPort: 3000
+      port: 3000
+      healthCheck:
+        enabled: false
+      resources:
+        requests:
+          cpu: 100m
+          memory: 256Mi
+        limits:
+          cpu: 500m
+          memory: 512Mi
+      env:
+        BACKEND_URL: http://aiq-backend:8000
+        NODE_ENV: production
+        DISABLE_AUTH: 'true'
+        NEXT_PUBLIC_DATADOG_ENABLED: 'false'
+      labels:
+        component: frontend
+      route:
+        enabled: false
+        host: localhost
+        annotations: {}
+        tls:
+          termination: edge
+          insecureEdgeTerminationPolicy: Redirect
+      enabled: true
+      ingress:
+        enabled: true
+        className: nginx
+        annotations: {}
+      podSecurityContext: null
+  secretEnvAsEnv: false
diff --git a/deploy/helm/helm-charts-k8s/aiq/.helmignore b/deploy/helm/helm-charts-k8s/aiq/.helmignore
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..b94bccd
--- /dev/null
+++ b/deploy/helm/helm-charts-k8s/aiq/.helmignore
@@ -0,0 +1,35 @@
+# Patterns to ignore when building packages.
+# This supports shell glob matching, relative path matching, and
+# negation (prefixed with !). Only one pattern per line.
+.DS_Store
+.git/
+.gitignore
+.bzr/
+.bzrignore
+.hg/
+.hgignore
+.svn/
+# Common VCS dirs
+.git/
+.gitignore
+.bzr/
+.bzrignore
+.hg/
+.hgignore
+.svn/
+# Common backup files
+*.swp
+*.bak
+*.tmp
+*.orig
+*~
+# Various IDEs
+.project
+.idea/
+*.tmproj
+.vscode/
+# Helm stuff
+OWNERS
+examples/
+README.md
+MIGRATION.md
diff --git a/deploy/helm/helm-charts-k8s/aiq/Chart.yaml b/deploy/helm/helm-charts-k8s/aiq/Chart.yaml
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..0801e48
--- /dev/null
+++ b/deploy/helm/helm-charts-k8s/aiq/Chart.yaml
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+apiVersion: v2
+appVersion: 2.0.0
+description: AI-Q Helm Chart
+name: aiq
+type: application
+version: "0.0.4"
diff --git a/deploy/helm/helm-charts-k8s/aiq/templates/_helpers.tpl b/deploy/helm/helm-charts-k8s/aiq/templates/_helpers.tpl
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..2a48d86
--- /dev/null
+++ b/deploy/helm/helm-charts-k8s/aiq/templates/_helpers.tpl
@@ -0,0 +1,250 @@
+{{/*
+Expand the name of the chart.
+*/}}
+{{- define "aiq.name" -}}
+{{- default .Chart.Name .Values.nameOverride | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
+{{- end }}
+
+{{/*
+Create a default fully qualified app name.
+*/}}
+{{- define "aiq.fullname" -}}
+{{- if .Values.fullnameOverride }}
+{{- .Values.fullnameOverride | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
+{{- else }}
+{{- $name := default .Chart.Name .Values.nameOverride }}
+{{- if contains $name .Release.Name }}
+{{- .Release.Name | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
+{{- else }}
+{{- printf "%s-%s" .Release.Name $name | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
+{{- end }}
+{{- end }}
+{{- end }}
+
+{{/*
+Create chart name and version as used by the chart label.
+*/}}
+{{- define "aiq.chart" -}}
+{{- printf "%s-%s" .Chart.Name .Chart.Version | replace "+" "_" | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
+{{- end }}
+
+{{/*
+Common labels
+*/}}
+{{- define "aiq.labels" -}}
+helm.sh/chart: {{ include "aiq.chart" . }}
+app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: {{ .Release.Service }}
+project: {{ .Values.project.name }}
+{{- with .Values.project.deploymentEnv }}
+environment: {{ . }}
+{{- end }}
+{{- if ne (.Values.project.orientation | default "internal") "external" }}
+{{- with .Values.project.dl }}
+dl: {{ . }}
+{{- end }}
+{{- with .Values.project.nspect_id }}
+nspect_id: {{ . }}
+{{- end }}
+{{- end }}
+{{- end }}
+
+{{/*
+Generate namespace name
+*/}}
+{{- define "aiq.namespace" -}}
+{{- if eq (.Values.project.deploymentTarget | default "") "kind" -}}
+{{- .Values.appname -}}
+{{- else -}}
+{{- printf "ns-%s" .Values.appname -}}
+{{- end -}}
+{{- end }}
+
+{{/*
+Generate app-specific name
+*/}}
+{{- define "aiq.appName" -}}
+{{- $global := index . 0 -}}
+{{- $appName := index . 1 -}}
+{{- printf "%s-%s" $global.Values.project.name $appName | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
+{{- end }}
+
+{{/*
+Generate app-specific fullname (with truncation)
+*/}}
+{{- define "aiq.appFullname" -}}
+{{- $global := index . 0 -}}
+{{- $appName := index . 1 -}}
+{{- printf "%s-%s" $global.Values.project.name ($appName | trunc 15 | trimSuffix "-") | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
+{{- end }}
+
+{{/*
+Generate app-specific labels
+*/}}
+{{- define "aiq.appLabels" -}}
+{{- $global := index . 0 -}}
+{{- $appName := index . 1 -}}
+{{- $appConfig := index . 2 -}}
+{{ include "aiq.labels" $global }}
+app: {{ include "aiq.appName" (list $global $appName) }}
+{{- with $appConfig.labels }}
+{{ toYaml . }}
+{{- end }}
+{{- end }}
+
+{{/*
+Generate app-specific selector labels
+*/}}
+{{- define "aiq.appSelectorLabels" -}}
+{{- $global := index . 0 -}}
+{{- $appName := index . 1 -}}
+app: {{ include "aiq.appName" (list $global $appName) }}
+{{- end }}
+
+{{/*
+Get component name (auto-derive from app name if not specified)
+*/}}
+{{- define "aiq.component" -}}
+{{- $appName := index . 0 -}}
+{{- $appConfig := index . 1 -}}
+{{- $appConfig.component | default $appName -}}
+{{- end }}
+
+{{/*
+Get image repository (use global, appDefaults, or app-specific)
+*/}}
+{{- define "aiq.imageRepository" -}}
+{{- $global := index . 0 -}}
+{{- $appConfig := index . 1 -}}
+{{- $defaults := $global.Values.appDefaults | default dict -}}
+{{- $defaultImage := $defaults.image | default dict -}}
+{{- $appImage := $appConfig.image | default dict -}}
+{{- if $appImage.repository -}}
+{{- $appImage.repository -}}
+{{- else if $global.Values.imageRepository -}}
+{{- $global.Values.imageRepository -}}
+{{- else if $defaultImage.repository -}}
+{{- $defaultImage.repository -}}
+{{- else -}}
+{{- fail "image.repository is required. Set it globally via imageRepository, in appDefaults.image.repository, or per app" -}}
+{{- end -}}
+{{- end }}
+
+{{/*
+Extract base name for auto-generating image names
+Uses project.name as the base for image names (e.g., "test-francis-z-2")
+This ensures image names match the project naming convention
+*/}}
+{{- define "aiq.imageBaseName" -}}
+{{- $global := index . 0 -}}
+{{- $appConfig := index . 1 -}}
+{{- $global.Values.project.name -}}
+{{- end }}
+
+{{/*
+Get image name (auto-generate from imageRepository base + app if not specified)
+*/}}
+{{- define "aiq.imageName" -}}
+{{- $global := index . 0 -}}
+{{- $appName := index . 1 -}}
+{{- $appConfig := index . 2 -}}
+{{- $appImage := $appConfig.image | default dict -}}
+{{- if $appImage.name -}}
+{{- $appImage.name -}}
+{{- else -}}
+{{- $baseName := include "aiq.imageBaseName" (list $global $appConfig) -}}
+{{- printf "%s-%s" $baseName $appName -}}
+{{- end -}}
+{{- end }}
+
+{{/*
+Auto-generate DataDog labels from project metadata (no-op if customerID not set)
+*/}}
+{{- define "aiq.datadogLabels" -}}
+{{- end }}
+
+{{/*
+Get app port (from port or ports[0].containerPort)
+*/}}
+{{- define "aiq.appPort" -}}
+{{- $appConfig := index . 0 -}}
+{{- if hasKey $appConfig "port" -}}
+{{- $appConfig.port -}}
+{{- else if hasKey $appConfig "ports" -}}
+{{- if $appConfig.ports -}}
+{{- (index $appConfig.ports 0).containerPort -}}
+{{- else -}}
+{{- fail "Either 'port' or 'ports' must be specified for the app" -}}
+{{- end -}}
+{{- else -}}
+{{- fail "Either 'port' or 'ports' must be specified for the app" -}}
+{{- end -}}
+{{- end }}
+
+{{/*
+Auto-generate ingress hostname
+Uses base name from imageRepository instead of full project name for consistency
+*/}}
+{{- define "aiq.ingressHostname" -}}
+{{- $global := index . 0 -}}
+{{- $appName := index . 1 -}}
+{{- $appConfig := index . 2 -}}
+{{- $appIngress := $appConfig.ingress | default dict -}}
+{{- $baseName := include "aiq.imageBaseName" (list $global $appConfig) -}}
+{{- if eq (kindOf $appIngress) "map" -}}
+{{- if $appIngress.hostname -}}
+{{- $appIngress.hostname -}}
+{{- else -}}
+{{- printf "%s-%s.local" $baseName $appName -}}
+{{- end -}}
+{{- else -}}
+{{- printf "%s-%s.local" $baseName $appName -}}
+{{- end -}}
+{{- end }}
+
+{{/*
+Merge app config with defaults
+Usage: include "aiq.mergeAppDefaults" (list $ $appName $appConfig)
+Returns: merged config with defaults applied
+*/}}
+{{- define "aiq.mergeAppDefaults" -}}
+{{- $global := index . 0 -}}
+{{- $appName := index . 1 -}}
+{{- $appConfig := index . 2 -}}
+{{- $merged := deepCopy $global.Values.appDefaults | mustMerge (deepCopy $appConfig) -}}
+{{- $merged | toJson -}}
+{{- end }}
+
+{{/*
+Get app config value with default fallback
+Usage: include "aiq.appValue" (dict "global" $ "app" $appConfig "path" "image.pullPolicy" "default" "IfNotPresent")
+*/}}
+{{- define "aiq.appValue" -}}
+{{- $global := .global -}}
+{{- $app := .app -}}
+{{- $path := .path -}}
+{{- $default := .default -}}
+{{- $pathParts := splitList "." $path -}}
+{{- $appValue := $app -}}
+{{- $defaultValue := $global.Values.appDefaults -}}
+{{- $foundApp := true -}}
+{{- $foundDefault := true -}}
+{{- range $pathParts -}}
+  {{- if and $foundApp (hasKey $appValue .) -}}
+    {{- $appValue = index $appValue . -}}
+  {{- else -}}
+    {{- $foundApp = false -}}
+  {{- end -}}
+  {{- if and $foundDefault (hasKey $defaultValue .) -}}
+    {{- $defaultValue = index $defaultValue . -}}
+  {{- else -}}
+    {{- $foundDefault = false -}}
+  {{- end -}}
+{{- end -}}
+{{- if $foundApp -}}
+  {{- $appValue -}}
+{{- else if $foundDefault -}}
+  {{- $defaultValue -}}
+{{- else -}}
+  {{- $default -}}
+{{- end -}}
+{{- end }}
diff --git a/deploy/helm/helm-charts-k8s/aiq/templates/configmap.yaml b/deploy/helm/helm-charts-k8s/aiq/templates/configmap.yaml
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..efa841a
--- /dev/null
+++ b/deploy/helm/helm-charts-k8s/aiq/templates/configmap.yaml
@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+{{- range $appName, $appConfig := .Values.apps }}
+{{- if and $appConfig.enabled (hasKey $appConfig "configMaps") }}
+{{- range $appConfig.configMaps }}
+---
+apiVersion: v1
+kind: ConfigMap
+metadata:
+  name: {{ .name }}
+  namespace: {{ include "aiq.namespace" $ }}
+  labels:
+    {{- include "aiq.appLabels" (list $ $appName $appConfig) | nindent 4 }}
+data:
+  {{- toYaml .data | nindent 2 }}
+{{- end }}
+{{- end }}
+{{- end }}
diff --git a/deploy/helm/helm-charts-k8s/aiq/templates/cronjob.yaml b/deploy/helm/helm-charts-k8s/aiq/templates/cronjob.yaml
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..7214436
--- /dev/null
+++ b/deploy/helm/helm-charts-k8s/aiq/templates/cronjob.yaml
@@ -0,0 +1,61 @@
+{{- range $appName, $appConfig := .Values.apps }}
+{{- if and $appConfig.enabled (hasKey $appConfig "cronJobs") }}
+{{- range $appConfig.cronJobs }}
+---
+apiVersion: batch/v1
+kind: CronJob
+metadata:
+  name: {{ .name }}
+  namespace: {{ include "aiq.namespace" $ }}
+  labels:
+    {{- include "aiq.appLabels" (list $ $appName $appConfig) | nindent 4 }}
+spec:
+  schedule: {{ .schedule | quote }}
+  {{- with .concurrencyPolicy }}
+  concurrencyPolicy: {{ . }}
+  {{- end }}
+  {{- with .successfulJobsHistoryLimit }}
+  successfulJobsHistoryLimit: {{ . }}
+  {{- end }}
+  {{- with .failedJobsHistoryLimit }}
+  failedJobsHistoryLimit: {{ . }}
+  {{- end }}
+  jobTemplate:
+    spec:
+      template:
+        metadata:
+          labels:
+            {{- include "aiq.appSelectorLabels" (list $ $appName) | nindent 12 }}
+        spec:
+          serviceAccountName: {{ include "aiq.appFullname" (list $ $appName) }}
+          restartPolicy: {{ .restartPolicy | default "OnFailure" }}
+          containers:
+          - name: {{ .name }}
+            {{- $jobImage := $appConfig.image | default dict }}
+            {{- if $jobImage.repository }}
+            image: "{{ $jobImage.repository }}:{{ $jobImage.tag | default "latest" }}"
+            {{- else }}
+            {{- $imageRepo := include "aiq.imageRepository" (list $ $appConfig) }}
+            {{- $imageName := include "aiq.imageName" (list $ $appName $appConfig) }}
+            image: "{{ $imageRepo }}/{{ $imageName }}:{{ $jobImage.tag | default "latest" }}"
+            {{- end }}
+            securityContext:
+              allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
+              capabilities:
+                drop:
+                  - ALL
+            {{- with .command }}
+            command:
+              {{- toYaml . | nindent 14 }}
+            {{- end }}
+            {{- with .args }}
+            args:
+              {{- toYaml . | nindent 14 }}
+            {{- end }}
+            {{- with .env }}
+            env:
+              {{- toYaml . | nindent 14 }}
+            {{- end }}
+{{- end }}
+{{- end }}
+{{- end }}
diff --git a/deploy/helm/helm-charts-k8s/aiq/templates/deployment.yaml b/deploy/helm/helm-charts-k8s/aiq/templates/deployment.yaml
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..d304f5f
--- /dev/null
+++ b/deploy/helm/helm-charts-k8s/aiq/templates/deployment.yaml
@@ -0,0 +1,257 @@
+{{- range $appName, $appConfig := .Values.apps }}
+{{- if $appConfig.enabled }}
+{{- /* Merge app config with defaults */ -}}
+{{- $defaults := $.Values.appDefaults | default dict }}
+{{- $replicaCount := $appConfig.replicaCount | default $appConfig.replicas | default $defaults.replicaCount | default 1 }}
+{{- $autoscaling := $appConfig.autoscaling | default $defaults.autoscaling | default dict }}
+---
+apiVersion: apps/v1
+kind: Deployment
+metadata:
+  name: {{ include "aiq.appFullname" (list $ $appName) }}
+  namespace: {{ include "aiq.namespace" $ }}
+  labels:
+    {{- include "aiq.appLabels" (list $ $appName $appConfig) | nindent 4 }}
+spec:
+  {{- if not $autoscaling.enabled }}
+  replicas: {{ $replicaCount }}
+  {{- end }}
+  {{- if hasKey $appConfig "revisionHistoryLimit" }}
+  revisionHistoryLimit: {{ $appConfig.revisionHistoryLimit }}
+  {{- end }}
+  {{- if hasKey $appConfig "deploymentStrategy" }}
+  strategy:
+    {{- toYaml $appConfig.deploymentStrategy | nindent 4 }}
+  {{- end }}
+  selector:
+    matchLabels:
+      {{- include "aiq.appSelectorLabels" (list $ $appName) | nindent 6 }}
+  template:
+    metadata:
+      labels:
+        {{- include "aiq.appSelectorLabels" (list $ $appName) | nindent 8 }}
+        {{- /* Auto-generate DataDog labels */ -}}
+        {{- include "aiq.datadogLabels" (list $ $appName $appConfig) | nindent 8 }}
+        {{- /* Merge app labels with defaults and auto-generated */ -}}
+        {{- $defaultLabels := $defaults.labels | default dict }}
+        {{- $appLabels := $appConfig.labels | default dict }}
+        {{- if or $appLabels $defaultLabels }}
+        {{- $mergedLabels := mustMerge (deepCopy $appLabels) (deepCopy $defaultLabels) }}
+        {{- toYaml $mergedLabels | nindent 8 }}
+        {{- end }}
+      {{- $defaultAnnotations := $defaults.podAnnotations | default dict }}
+      {{- $appAnnotations := $appConfig.podAnnotations | default dict }}
+      {{- $datadogConfig := $.Values.datadog | default dict }}
+      {{- $datadogEnabled := $datadogConfig.enabled | default false }}
+      {{- $datadogAnnotations := dict }}
+      {{- if $datadogEnabled }}
+        {{- $language := $appConfig.datadogLanguage | default $datadogConfig.defaultLanguage | default "python" }}
+        {{- $version := $appConfig.datadogVersion | default $datadogConfig.defaultVersion | default "v3.10.2" }}
+        {{- $annotationKey := printf "admission.datadoghq.com/%s-lib.version" $language }}
+        {{- $datadogAnnotations = dict $annotationKey $version }}
+      {{- end }}
+      {{- $allAnnotations := mustMerge (deepCopy $appAnnotations) (deepCopy $defaultAnnotations) (deepCopy $datadogAnnotations) }}
+      {{- if $allAnnotations }}
+      annotations:
+        {{- toYaml $allAnnotations | nindent 8 }}
+      {{- end }}
+    spec:
+      {{- $serviceAccount := $appConfig.serviceAccount | default $defaults.serviceAccount | default dict }}
+      {{- if and (hasKey $serviceAccount "name") $serviceAccount.name }}
+      serviceAccountName: {{ $serviceAccount.name }}
+      {{- else }}
+      serviceAccountName: {{ include "aiq.appFullname" (list $ $appName) }}
+      {{- end }}
+      {{- if and $appConfig.imagePullSecrets (gt (len $appConfig.imagePullSecrets) 0) }}
+      imagePullSecrets:
+        {{- toYaml $appConfig.imagePullSecrets | nindent 8 }}
+      {{- else if and $.Values.imagePullSecrets (gt (len $.Values.imagePullSecrets) 0) }}
+      imagePullSecrets:
+        {{- toYaml $.Values.imagePullSecrets | nindent 8 }}
+      {{- end }}
+      {{- if hasKey $appConfig "podSecurityContext" }}
+      {{- if $appConfig.podSecurityContext }}
+      securityContext:
+        {{- toYaml $appConfig.podSecurityContext | nindent 8 }}
+      {{- end }}
+      {{- else }}
+      securityContext:
+        runAsNonRoot: true
+        seccompProfile:
+          type: RuntimeDefault
+      {{- end }}
+      {{- with $appConfig.initContainers }}
+      initContainers:
+        {{- toYaml . | nindent 6 }}
+      {{- end }}
+      containers:
+      - name: {{ $appName }}
+        {{- $defaultImage := $defaults.image | default dict }}
+        {{- $appImage := $appConfig.image | default dict }}
+        {{- $imageTag := $appImage.tag | default "latest" }}
+        {{- $imagePullPolicy := $appImage.pullPolicy | default $defaultImage.pullPolicy | default "IfNotPresent" }}
+        {{- if $appImage.repository }}
+        image: "{{ $appImage.repository }}:{{ $imageTag }}"
+        {{- else }}
+        {{- $imageRepo := include "aiq.imageRepository" (list $ $appConfig) }}
+        {{- $imageName := include "aiq.imageName" (list $ $appName $appConfig) }}
+        image: "{{ $imageRepo }}/{{ $imageName }}:{{ $imageTag }}"
+        {{- end }}
+        imagePullPolicy: {{ $imagePullPolicy }}
+        {{- with $appConfig.command }}
+        command:
+          {{- toYaml . | nindent 10 }}
+        {{- end }}
+        {{- with $appConfig.args }}
+        args:
+          {{- toYaml . | nindent 10 }}
+        {{- end }}
+        {{- if $appConfig.stdin }}
+        stdin: {{ $appConfig.stdin }}
+        {{- end }}
+        {{- if $appConfig.tty }}
+        tty: {{ $appConfig.tty }}
+        {{- end }}
+        {{- if $appConfig.ports }}
+        ports:
+        {{- range $appConfig.ports }}
+        - name: {{ .name }}
+          containerPort: {{ .containerPort }}
+          protocol: {{ .protocol | default "TCP" }}
+        {{- end }}
+        {{- else if $appConfig.port }}
+        ports:
+        - name: http
+          containerPort: {{ $appConfig.port }}
+          protocol: TCP
+        {{- end }}
+        {{- /* Health checks with defaults and smart port handling */ -}}
+        {{- $defaultHealthCheck := $defaults.healthCheck | default dict }}
+        {{- $appHealthCheck := $appConfig.healthCheck | default dict }}
+        {{- $healthCheckEnabled := false }}
+        {{- if hasKey $appHealthCheck "enabled" }}
+        {{- $healthCheckEnabled = $appHealthCheck.enabled }}
+        {{- else if hasKey $defaultHealthCheck "enabled" }}
+        {{- $healthCheckEnabled = $defaultHealthCheck.enabled }}
+        {{- end }}
+        {{- if $healthCheckEnabled }}
+        {{- $appPort := include "aiq.appPort" (list $appConfig) }}
+        {{- $healthPath := $appHealthCheck.path | default $defaultHealthCheck.path | default "/health" }}
+        {{- $livenessProbe := $appHealthCheck.livenessProbe | default $defaultHealthCheck.livenessProbe }}
+        {{- with $livenessProbe }}
+        livenessProbe:
+          {{- toYaml . | nindent 10 }}
+        {{- end }}
+        {{- $readinessProbe := $appHealthCheck.readinessProbe | default $defaultHealthCheck.readinessProbe }}
+        {{- with $readinessProbe }}
+        readinessProbe:
+          {{- toYaml . | nindent 10 }}
+        {{- end }}
+        {{- $startupProbe := $appHealthCheck.startupProbe | default $defaultHealthCheck.startupProbe }}
+        {{- with $startupProbe }}
+        startupProbe:
+          {{- toYaml . | nindent 10 }}
+        {{- end }}
+        {{- end }}
+        {{- /* Resources with defaults */ -}}
+        {{- $defaultResources := $defaults.resources | default dict }}
+        {{- $appResources := $appConfig.resources | default dict }}
+        {{- $mergedResources := mustMerge (deepCopy $appResources) (deepCopy $defaultResources) }}
+        {{- with $mergedResources }}
+        resources:
+          {{- toYaml . | nindent 10 }}
+        {{- end }}
+        {{- if or $appConfig.env $appConfig.extraEnv $.Values.secretEnvAsEnv }}
+        env:
+        {{- /* Auto-generate common env vars */ -}}
+        {{- $autoEnv := dict }}
+        {{- if not (and $appConfig.env (hasKey $appConfig.env "ENV")) }}
+        {{- $_ := set $autoEnv "ENV" $.Values.project.deploymentEnv }}
+        {{- end }}
+        {{- if and (not (and $appConfig.env (hasKey $appConfig.env "PORT"))) $appConfig.port }}
+        {{- $_ := set $autoEnv "PORT" (toString $appConfig.port) }}
+        {{- end }}
+        {{- range $key, $value := $autoEnv }}
+        - name: {{ $key }}
+          value: {{ $value | quote }}
+        {{- end }}
+        {{- /* User-specified env vars */ -}}
+        {{- range $key, $value := $appConfig.env }}
+        - name: {{ $key }}
+          value: {{ $value | quote }}
+        {{- end }}
+        {{- with $appConfig.extraEnv }}
+        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
+        {{- end }}
+        {{- /* Inline secretEnv when secretEnvAsEnv is true (Kind/local dev) */ -}}
+        {{- if $.Values.secretEnvAsEnv }}
+        {{- range $key, $value := $.Values.secretEnv }}
+        {{- if $value }}
+        - name: {{ $key }}
+          value: {{ $value | quote }}
+        {{- end }}
+        {{- end }}
+        {{- /* Also check per-app secretEnv */ -}}
+        {{- range $key, $value := $appConfig.secretEnv }}
+        {{- if $value }}
+        - name: {{ $key }}
+          value: {{ $value | quote }}
+        {{- end }}
+        {{- end }}
+        {{- end }}
+        {{- end }}
+        {{- if or $appConfig.envFrom (and $.Values.sharedSecrets.enabled $.Values.sharedSecrets.autoMount) }}
+        envFrom:
+        {{- if and $.Values.sharedSecrets.enabled $.Values.sharedSecrets.autoMount }}
+        - secretRef:
+            name: {{ $.Values.sharedSecrets.targetSecretName | default (printf "%s-credentials" $.Values.project.name) }}
+        {{- end }}
+        {{- with $appConfig.envFrom }}
+        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
+        {{- end }}
+        {{- end }}
+        {{- if or $appConfig.volumeMounts (and $.Values.fusionConfig $.Values.fusionConfig.enabled) }}
+        volumeMounts:
+        {{- if and $.Values.fusionConfig $.Values.fusionConfig.enabled }}
+        - name: {{ $.Values.fusionConfig.volumeName | default "config" }}
+          mountPath: {{ $.Values.fusionConfig.mountPath | default "/app/config" }}
+          readOnly: true
+        {{- end }}
+        {{- with $appConfig.volumeMounts }}
+          {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
+        {{- end }}
+        {{- end }}
+        securityContext:
+          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
+          capabilities:
+            drop:
+            - ALL
+          readOnlyRootFilesystem: false
+      {{- with $appConfig.sidecars }}
+      {{- toYaml . | nindent 6 }}
+      {{- end }}
+      {{- if or $appConfig.volumes (and $.Values.fusionConfig $.Values.fusionConfig.enabled) }}
+      volumes:
+      {{- if and $.Values.fusionConfig $.Values.fusionConfig.enabled }}
+      - name: {{ $.Values.fusionConfig.volumeName | default "config" }}
+        configMap:
+          name: {{ $.Values.fusionConfig.configMapName | default (printf "%s-config" (include "aiq.fullname" $ | lower)) }}
+      {{- end }}
+      {{- with $appConfig.volumes }}
+        {{- toYaml . | nindent 6 }}
+      {{- end }}
+      {{- end }}
+      {{- with $appConfig.nodeSelector }}
+      nodeSelector:
+        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
+      {{- end }}
+      {{- with $appConfig.affinity }}
+      affinity:
+        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
+      {{- end }}
+      {{- with $appConfig.tolerations }}
+      tolerations:
+        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
+      {{- end }}
+{{- end }}
+{{- end }}
diff --git a/deploy/helm/helm-charts-k8s/aiq/templates/hpa.yaml b/deploy/helm/helm-charts-k8s/aiq/templates/hpa.yaml
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..0259ef1
--- /dev/null
+++ b/deploy/helm/helm-charts-k8s/aiq/templates/hpa.yaml
@@ -0,0 +1,46 @@
+{{- range $appName, $appConfig := .Values.apps }}
+{{- if $appConfig.enabled }}
+{{- $defaults := $.Values.appDefaults | default dict }}
+{{- $defaultAutoscaling := $defaults.autoscaling | default dict }}
+{{- $appAutoscaling := $appConfig.autoscaling | default dict }}
+{{- $autoscalingEnabled := hasKey $appAutoscaling "enabled" | ternary $appAutoscaling.enabled (hasKey $defaultAutoscaling "enabled" | ternary $defaultAutoscaling.enabled false) }}
+{{- if $autoscalingEnabled }}
+{{- $minReplicas := $appAutoscaling.minReplicas | default $defaultAutoscaling.minReplicas | default 1 }}
+{{- $maxReplicas := $appAutoscaling.maxReplicas | default $defaultAutoscaling.maxReplicas | default 3 }}
+{{- $targetCPU := $appAutoscaling.targetCPUUtilizationPercentage | default $defaultAutoscaling.targetCPUUtilizationPercentage }}
+{{- $targetMemory := $appAutoscaling.targetMemoryUtilizationPercentage | default $defaultAutoscaling.targetMemoryUtilizationPercentage }}
+---
+apiVersion: autoscaling/v2
+kind: HorizontalPodAutoscaler
+metadata:
+  name: {{ include "aiq.appFullname" (list $ $appName) }}
+  namespace: {{ include "aiq.namespace" $ }}
+  labels:
+    {{- include "aiq.appLabels" (list $ $appName $appConfig) | nindent 4 }}
+spec:
+  scaleTargetRef:
+    apiVersion: apps/v1
+    kind: Deployment
+    name: {{ include "aiq.appFullname" (list $ $appName) }}
+  minReplicas: {{ $minReplicas }}
+  maxReplicas: {{ $maxReplicas }}
+  metrics:
+  {{- if $targetCPU }}
+  - type: Resource
+    resource:
+      name: cpu
+      target:
+        type: Utilization
+        averageUtilization: {{ $targetCPU }}
+  {{- end }}
+  {{- if $targetMemory }}
+  - type: Resource
+    resource:
+      name: memory
+      target:
+        type: Utilization
+        averageUtilization: {{ $targetMemory }}
+  {{- end }}
+{{- end }}
+{{- end }}
+{{- end }}
diff --git a/deploy/helm/helm-charts-k8s/aiq/templates/imagepullsecrets.yaml b/deploy/helm/helm-charts-k8s/aiq/templates/imagepullsecrets.yaml
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..f3c041f
--- /dev/null
+++ b/deploy/helm/helm-charts-k8s/aiq/templates/imagepullsecrets.yaml
@@ -0,0 +1,29 @@
+{{- if .Values.imagePullSecrets }}
+{{- if .Values.imagePullSecrets.dockerRegistry }}
+---
+apiVersion: v1
+kind: Secret
+metadata:
+  name: {{ .Values.project.name }}-docker-pull-secret
+  namespace: {{ include "aiq.namespace" . }}
+  labels:
+    {{- include "aiq.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
+type: kubernetes.io/dockerconfigjson
+data:
+  .dockerconfigjson: {{ .Values.imagePullSecrets.dockerRegistry | b64enc }}
+{{- end }}
+
+{{- if .Values.imagePullSecrets.artifactRegistry }}
+---
+apiVersion: v1
+kind: Secret
+metadata:
+  name: {{ .Values.project.name }}-artifact-pull-secret
+  namespace: {{ include "aiq.namespace" . }}
+  labels:
+    {{- include "aiq.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
+type: kubernetes.io/dockerconfigjson
+data:
+  .dockerconfigjson: {{ .Values.imagePullSecrets.artifactRegistry | b64enc }}
+{{- end }}
+{{- end }}
diff --git a/deploy/helm/helm-charts-k8s/aiq/templates/ingress.yaml b/deploy/helm/helm-charts-k8s/aiq/templates/ingress.yaml
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..db16d56
--- /dev/null
+++ b/deploy/helm/helm-charts-k8s/aiq/templates/ingress.yaml
@@ -0,0 +1,99 @@
+{{- range $appName, $appConfig := .Values.apps }}
+{{- if $appConfig.enabled }}
+{{- $defaults := $.Values.appDefaults | default dict }}
+{{- $defaultIngress := $defaults.ingress | default dict }}
+{{- $appIngress := $appConfig.ingress | default dict }}
+{{- $ingressEnabled := false }}
+{{- if eq (kindOf $appIngress) "bool" }}
+{{- $ingressEnabled = $appIngress }}
+{{- else if hasKey $appIngress "enabled" }}
+{{- $ingressEnabled = $appIngress.enabled }}
+{{- else if hasKey $defaultIngress "enabled" }}
+{{- $ingressEnabled = $defaultIngress.enabled }}
+{{- end }}
+{{- if $ingressEnabled }}
+{{- /* Merge ingress annotations */ -}}
+{{- $defaultAnnotations := $defaultIngress.annotations | default dict }}
+{{- $appAnnotations := dict }}
+{{- if eq (kindOf $appIngress) "map" }}
+{{- $appAnnotations = $appIngress.annotations | default dict }}
+{{- end }}
+{{- /* Auto-generate hostname if not in hosts */ -}}
+{{- $autoHostname := include "aiq.ingressHostname" (list $ $appName $appConfig) }}
+{{- $hostsConfig := list }}
+{{- if and (eq (kindOf $appIngress) "map") $appIngress.hosts }}
+{{- $hostsConfig = $appIngress.hosts }}
+{{- else }}
+{{- $hostsConfig = list (dict "host" $autoHostname "paths" (list (dict "path" "/" "pathType" "Prefix"))) }}
+{{- end }}
+{{- /* Auto-add nvidia-dns-updater annotation if hostname is auto-generated and not external */ -}}
+{{- if and (not (hasKey $appAnnotations "nvidia-dns-updater.kubernetes.io/hostname")) (ne ($.Values.project.orientation | default "internal") "external") }}
+{{- if $hostsConfig }}
+{{- $_ := set $appAnnotations "nvidia-dns-updater.kubernetes.io/hostname" (index $hostsConfig 0).host }}
+{{- end }}
+{{- end }}
+{{- $mergedAnnotations := mustMerge (deepCopy $appAnnotations) (deepCopy $defaultAnnotations) }}
+{{- /* Determine TLS configuration */ -}}
+{{- $tlsConfig := list }}
+{{- if and (eq (kindOf $appIngress) "map") $appIngress.tls }}
+{{- $tlsConfig = $appIngress.tls }}
+{{- else if $defaultIngress.tls }}
+{{- /* Auto-generate TLS config from hosts and default secret */ -}}
+{{- $tlsHosts := list }}
+{{- range $hostsConfig }}
+{{- $tlsHosts = append $tlsHosts .host }}
+{{- end }}
+{{- $defaultTLS := index $defaultIngress.tls 0 }}
+{{- $tlsConfig = list (dict "hosts" $tlsHosts "secretName" $defaultTLS.secretName) }}
+{{- end }}
+---
+apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
+kind: Ingress
+metadata:
+  name: {{ include "aiq.appFullname" (list $ $appName) }}
+  namespace: {{ include "aiq.namespace" $ }}
+  labels:
+    {{- include "aiq.appLabels" (list $ $appName $appConfig) | nindent 4 }}
+  {{- if $mergedAnnotations }}
+  annotations:
+    {{- toYaml $mergedAnnotations | nindent 4 }}
+  {{- end }}
+spec:
+  {{- $ingressCl

Place the files in `frontends/benchmarks/deepresearch_bench/data/`:\n", " - `drb_full_dataset.json` (required)\n", " - `criteria.jsonl` (required)" @@ -553,10 +572,11 @@ " chat_template_kwargs:\n", " enable_thinking: true\n", "\n", + " # Update this section with the name of the judge model you chose\n", " judge_llm:\n", " _type: openai\n", - " model_name: \"gpt-5\" # Update the model name\n", - " api_key: ${OPENAI_API_KEY}\n", + " model_name: \"gpt-5.2\" \n", + " api_key: \"\"\n", " timeout: 600\n", " max_retries: 10\n", " temperature: 0.1\n", @@ -607,6 +627,21 @@ " criteria_file: frontends/benchmarks/deepresearch_bench/data/criteria.jsonl" ] }, + { + "cell_type": "code", + "execution_count": null, + "id": "551b1174", + "metadata": {}, + "outputs": [], + "source": [ + "# If using OpenAI, you can set the API key in the environment variable OPENAI_API_KEY\n", + "# import getpass\n", + "\n", + "# if \"OPENAI_API_KEY\" not in os.environ:\n", + "# openai_api_key = getpass.getpass(\"Enter your OpenAI API key: \")\n", + "# os.environ[\"OPENAI_API_KEY\"] = openai_api_key" + ] + }, { "cell_type": "code", "execution_count": null, @@ -614,7 +649,7 @@ "metadata": {}, "outputs": [], "source": [ - "!nat eval --config_file frontends/benchmarks/deepresearch_bench/configs/config_deep_research_bench.yml" + "!.venv/bin/nat eval --config_file frontends/benchmarks/deepresearch_bench/configs/config_deep_research_bench.yml" ] }, { diff --git a/docs/source/customization/index.md b/docs/source/customization/index.md index c1b0f24..ddb9047 100644 --- a/docs/source/customization/index.md +++ b/docs/source/customization/index.md @@ -5,11 +5,11 @@ SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0 # Customization -```{admonition} Customization vs. Extending +## Customization vs Extending **Customization** is for changing what already exists in the blueprint — models, prompts, tool configuration, and agent behavior. author: Ajay Thorve
message: add github actions
patch:
commit 124719124d6689242ffbf69d8104c658c0a99b4f
Author: Ajay Thorve <athorve@nvidia.com>
Date:   Mon Feb 23 18:43:53 2026 -0800

    add github actions
---
 .github/workflows/ci.yml | 155 ++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
 .github/workflows/ui.yml | 157 +++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
 2 files changed, 312 insertions(+)

diff --git a/.github/workflows/ci.yml b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..4f5ca32
--- /dev/null
+++ b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
@@ -0,0 +1,155 @@
+name: AIQ CI
+
+on:
+  pull_request:
+    branches:
+      - develop
+  push:
+    branches:
+      - develop
+
+permissions:
+  contents: read
+
+concurrency:
+  group: aiq-ci-${{ github.ref }}
+  cancel-in-progress: true
+
+jobs:
+  pre-commit:
+    name: Lint and Hooks
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Setup Python
+        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
+        with:
+          python-version: "3.13"
+
+      - name: Setup uv
+        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v4
+        with:
+          enable-cache: true
+
+      - name: Setup Node
+        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: "20"
+
+      - name: Install markdown-link-check
+        run: npm install -g markdown-link-check
+
+      - name: Install dev dependencies
+        run: |
+          uv venv --python 3.13 .venv
+          . .venv/bin/activate
+          uv pip install -e ".[dev]"
+          uv pip install nbconvert
+
+      - name: Ruff checks
+        run: |
+          . .venv/bin/activate
+          ruff check .
+          ruff format --check .
+
+      - name: Run remaining pre-commit hooks
+        run: |
+          . .venv/bin/activate
+          SKIP=ruff-check,ruff-format pre-commit run --all-files
+
+  test:
+    name: Pytest and Coverage
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Setup Python
+        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
+        with:
+          python-version: "3.13"
+
+      - name: Setup uv
+        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v4
+        with:
+          enable-cache: true
+
+      - name: Install test dependencies
+        run: |
+          uv venv --python 3.13 .venv
+          . .venv/bin/activate
+          uv pip install -e ".[dev]"
+          uv pip install -e ./frontends/aiq_api
+          uv pip install -e "./sources/knowledge_layer[all]"
+
+      - name: Run tests with coverage
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          . .venv/bin/activate
+          python -X faulthandler -m pytest tests/ -v \
+            --junitxml=report.xml \
+            --cov=src/aiq_agent \
+            --cov-report=xml \
+            --cov-report=html \
+            --cov-report=term
+
+      - name: Upload coverage artifacts
+        if: always()
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: pytest-coverage
+          path: |
+            report.xml
+            coverage.xml
+            htmlcov/
+          retention-days: 7
+
+  test-scripts:
+    name: Script Validation
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Setup Python
+        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
+        with:
+          python-version: "3.13"
+
+      - name: Setup uv
+        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v4
+        with:
+          enable-cache: true
+
+      - name: Install script test dependencies
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          uv venv --python 3.13 .venv
+          . .venv/bin/activate
+          uv pip install -e ".[dev]"
+
+          for pkg in \
+            ./frontends/cli \
+            ./frontends/debug \
+            ./frontends/aiq_api \
+            ./frontends/benchmarks/deepresearch_bench \
+            ./frontends/benchmarks/freshqa \
+            ./frontends/benchmarks/intent_classifier \
+            ./sources/tavily_web_search \
+            ./sources/google_scholar_paper_search \
+            ./sources/eci
+          do
+            if [ -d "$pkg" ]; then
+              uv pip install -e "$pkg"
+            fi
+          done
+
+      - name: Run script tests
+        run: |
+          . .venv/bin/activate
+          chmod +x ci/scripts/test_scripts.sh
+          ci/scripts/test_scripts.sh --skip-setup
+
diff --git a/.github/workflows/ui.yml b/.github/workflows/ui.yml
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..4dd66ec
--- /dev/null
+++ b/.github/workflows/ui.yml
@@ -0,0 +1,157 @@
+name: AIQ UI CI
+
+on:
+  pull_request:
+    branches:
+      - develop
+    paths:
+      - "frontends/ui/**"
+      - ".github/workflows/ui.yml"
+  push:
+    branches:
+      - develop
+    paths:
+      - "frontends/ui/**"
+      - ".github/workflows/ui.yml"
+
+permissions:
+  contents: read
+
+concurrency:
+  group: aiq-ui-${{ github.ref }}
+  cancel-in-progress: true
+
+jobs:
+  install:
+    name: Install Dependencies
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    defaults:
+      run:
+        working-directory: frontends/ui
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Setup Node
+        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: "22"
+          cache: npm
+          cache-dependency-path: frontends/ui/package-lock.json
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: npm ci
+
+  lint:
+    name: UI Lint
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: install
+    defaults:
+      run:
+        working-directory: frontends/ui
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Setup Node
+        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: "22"
+          cache: npm
+          cache-dependency-path: frontends/ui/package-lock.json
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: npm ci
+
+      - name: Run lint
+        run: npm run lint
+
+  type-check:
+    name: UI Type Check
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: install
+    defaults:
+      run:
+        working-directory: frontends/ui
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Setup Node
+        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: "22"
+          cache: npm
+          cache-dependency-path: frontends/ui/package-lock.json
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: npm ci
+
+      - name: Run type-check
+        run: npm run type-check
+
+  unit-test:
+    name: UI Unit Tests
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: install
+    defaults:
+      run:
+        working-directory: frontends/ui
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Setup Node
+        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: "22"
+          cache: npm
+          cache-dependency-path: frontends/ui/package-lock.json
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: npm ci
+
+      - name: Run unit tests
+        run: npm run test:ci
+
+      - name: Upload UI coverage artifact
+        if: always()
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: ui-coverage
+          path: frontends/ui/coverage/
+          retention-days: 7
+
+  build:
+    name: UI Build
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs:
+      - lint
+      - type-check
+      - unit-test
+    defaults:
+      run:
+        working-directory: frontends/ui
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Setup Node
+        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: "22"
+          cache: npm
+          cache-dependency-path: frontends/ui/package-lock.json
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: npm ci
+
+      - name: Build
+        run: npm run build
+
+      - name: Upload UI build artifact
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: ui-next-build
+          path: frontends/ui/.next/
+          retention-days: 7
